summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 740

core_modules.description: Top-level import surface for NetworkX; re-exports graph classes, algorithms, generators, read/write, and utility APIs for direct import usage.
Core undirected graph data structure with node/edge attribute support; foundational object for most algorithms.
Directed graph data structure used by traversal, shortest path, flow, and DAG algorithms.
Undirected multigraph supporting parallel edges and attributes.
Directed multigraph with parallel edge support.
Primary weighted shortest-path implementations; high-value callable set for MCP tool exposure.
Unweighted shortest path routines for general graph analysis.
Widely used centrality metrics for node/edge importance.
Community detection entry points suitable for higher-level analytical MCP operations.
Common graph generators for synthetic test/sample graphs.
GEXF format I/O for exchange with external graph tools.
JSON-safe graph conversion ideal for MCP tool input/output payloads.
Matrix conversion bridge between NetworkX and numerical backends.
